chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.331 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ------------------------- 18.02.2026 Mr. Waseem Raza Memon, advocate for applicant Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. & Ms. Rukhsana Qassim Mirjat, ADPP Complainant present in person ------------------------------------ Applicant Rehman Khan son of Abdul Rehman seeks pre-arrest bail in FIR No.38/2026, registered at Police Station Sohrab Goth, for offence under Sections 354, 506, 337(i), PPC, after rejection of her bail plea by learned Additional Sessions Judge-VII, Malir Karachi vide order dated 27.01.2026. Learned counsel for applicant submits that during pendency of instant criminal bail application, parties have settled their dispute outside the Court. Complainant present in Court submits application for recording no objection and has sworn such affidavit, which is taken on record. Learned A.P.G. has recorded on objection on the ground that parties have settled their dispute outside the Court. In view of above, interim pre-arrest bail granted to applicant by this Court vide order dated 30.01.2026 is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. Instant criminal bail application stands disposed of in above terms. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
